item.title: Scores for 2026-04-03
item.description: Pot limit Omaha Hi-Lo Place User Points 1 Norma1 12,000 2 Maryjean 10,000 3 PaPaLarry 8,000 4 Nana_Sharon 6,000 5 Kevin 4,000 6 bill 2,000 7 JoAnnmeme 1,000 8 patc 500 No limit Omaha Hi-Lo Place User Points 1 patc 12,000 2 bill 10,000 3 Kevin 8,000 4 JoAnnmeme 6,000 5 Nana_Sharon 4,000 6 Maryjean 2,000 7 PaPaLarry 1,000 8 Norma1 500 Month Point Totals Place User Points 1t Norma1 12,500 1t patc 12,500 3t Kevin 12,000 3t Maryjean 12,000 3t bill 12,000 6 Nana_Sharon 10,000 7 PaPaLarry 9,000 8 JoAnnmeme 7,000
